def negative_constant_frozenset_or_dict_rebuilt_on_each_call():
    rule_id = "constant_frozenset_or_dict_rebuilt_on_each_call"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag frequent call paths that reconstruct constant lookup tables each invocation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
